title: rosa × geminata var. opacifolia
intro: Rosa × geminata var. opacifolia, also known as Opacifolia rose, is a hybrid rose species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Opacifolia rose include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to boost overall health.
